name: Summer Squash Medley
recipeIngredient: ½ cup julienne-cut red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large nonstick skillet coated with cooking spray.
2. Add squash, zucchini, and bell pepper; sauté over medium high heat 5 minutes or until crisp-tender.
3. Remove from heat; stir in remaining ingredients.
